name: Conway Twitty
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter, flour, and chopped pecans together. Press into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix half of the cool whip with the cream cheese and sugar until combined.
4. Spread the mixture evenly over the baked cake layers.
5. Prepare the pudding mixtures by combining each with milk. Beat for 3 minutes.
6. Layer one pudding mixture on top of the cream cheese layer.
7. Top with the remaining half of the cool whip.
